Text.Page:
Please...you have to help me, ! My pet dracoloth is deathly ill. He's so weak, he can hardly move. Only one thing will save him—a heart transplant!

I can do the procedure, but I need a compatible heart. There's a dracoloth nearby, named Nyxarras, that's been terrorizing the area. Killing that menace and delivering its still-beating heart to me would be a boon to everyone—and would save me little precious here. Please, you have to do this for me.

Do you have it? Still beating? Fantastic!

Give it to me, quickly! My precious is hanging on by a thread.
Don't dawdle once you have Nyxarras's beating heart in your hand.
